# Generated by: make samples (same as make demo, captured to file)
# Regenerate: make samples

=== SpiceDB / Zed (first 100 lines) ==================================
// Generated SpiceDB/Zed Schema from TypeSpec type graph
// Produced by walking the compiled TypeSpec program.

definition rbac/principal {
}

definition rbac/role {
    permission any_any_any = t_any_any_any
    permission inventory_any_any = t_inventory_any_any
    permission inventory_hosts_any = t_inventory_hosts_any
    permission inventory_any_read = t_inventory_any_read
    permission inventory_hosts_read = t_inventory_hosts_read
    permission inventory_any_write = t_inventory_any_write
    permission inventory_hosts_write = t_inventory_hosts_write
    permission remediations_any_any = t_remediations_any_any
    permission remediations_remediations_any = t_remediations_remediations_any
    permission remediations_any_read = t_remediations_any_read
    permission remediations_remediations_read = t_remediations_remediations_read
    permission remediations_any_write = t_remediations_any_write
    permission remediations_remediations_write = t_remediations_remediations_write
    permission inventory_host_view = any_any_any + inventory_any_any + inventory_hosts_any + inventory_any_read + inventory_hosts_read
    permission inventory_host_update = any_any_any + inventory_any_any + inventory_hosts_any + inventory_any_write + inventory_hosts_write
    permission remediations_remediation_view = any_any_any + remediations_any_any + remediations_remediations_any + remediations_any_read + remediations_remediations_read
    permission remediations_remediation_update = any_any_any + remediations_any_any + remediations_remediations_any + remediations_any_write + remediations_remediations_write

    relation t_any_any_any: rbac/principal:*
    relation t_inventory_any_any: rbac/principal:*
    relation t_inventory_hosts_any: rbac/principal:*
    relation t_inventory_any_read: rbac/principal:*
    relation t_inventory_hosts_read: rbac/principal:*
    relation t_inventory_any_write: rbac/principal:*
    relation t_inventory_hosts_write: rbac/principal:*
    relation t_remediations_any_any: rbac/principal:*
    relation t_remediations_remediations_any: rbac/principal:*
    relation t_remediations_any_read: rbac/principal:*
    relation t_remediations_remediations_read: rbac/principal:*
    relation t_remediations_any_write: rbac/principal:*
    relation t_remediations_remediations_write: rbac/principal:*
}

definition rbac/role_binding {
    permission subject = t_subject
    permission granted = t_granted
    permission inventory_host_view = (subject & t_granted->inventory_host_view)
    permission inventory_host_update = (subject & t_granted->inventory_host_update)
    permission remediations_remediation_view = (subject & t_granted->remediations_remediation_view)
    permission remediations_remediation_update = (subject & t_granted->remediations_remediation_update)

    relation t_subject: rbac/principal
    relation t_granted: rbac/role
}

definition rbac/workspace {
    permission parent = t_parent
    permission binding = t_binding
    permission inventory_host_view = t_binding->inventory_host_view + t_parent->inventory_host_view
    permission inventory_host_update = t_binding->inventory_host_update + t_parent->inventory_host_update
    permission remediations_remediation_view = t_binding->remediations_remediation_view + t_parent->remediations_remediation_view
    permission remediations_remediation_update = t_binding->remediations_remediation_update + t_parent->remediations_remediation_update
    permission view_metadata = inventory_host_view + remediations_remediation_view

    relation t_parent: rbac/workspace
    relation t_binding: rbac/role_binding
}

definition inventory/host {
    permission workspace = t_workspace
    permission view = t_workspace->inventory_host_view
    permission update = t_workspace->inventory_host_update

    relation t_workspace: rbac/workspace
}


=== Service metadata (JSON) =========================================
{
  "inventory": {
    "permissions": [
      "inventory_host_view",
      "inventory_host_update"
    ],
    "resources": [
      "host"
    ]
  },
  "remediations": {
    "permissions": [
      "remediations_remediation_view",
      "remediations_remediation_update"
    ],
    "resources": []
  }
}

=== Unified JSON Schema (first 3500 chars; full: --unified-jsonschema) ==
{
  "inventory/host": {
    "$schema": "https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema",
    "$id": "inventory/host",
    "type": "object",
    "properties": {
      "workspace_id": {
        "type": "string",
        "format": "uuid",
        "source": "relation workspace: rbac/workspace [ExactlyOne]"
      },
      "inventory_host_view_id": {
        "type": "string",
        "source": "extension-declared",
        "format": "uuid"
      },
      "inventory_host_update_id": {
        "type": "string",
        "source": "extension-declared",
        "format": "uuid"
      },
      "remediations_remediation_view_id": {
        "type": "string",
        "source": "extension-declared",
        "format": "uuid"
      },
      "remediations_remediation_update_id": {
        "type": "string",
        "source": "extension-declared",
        "format": "uuid"
      }
    },
    "required": [
      "workspace_id",
      "inventory_host_view_id",
      "inventory_host_update_id",
      "remediations_remediation_view_id",
      "remediations_remediation_update_id"
    ]
  }
}
